title: LLM Price Catalog
description: Versioned, checksum-protected snapshot of provider/model unit prices. Bundled starter ships at ao_kernel/defaults/catalogs/price-catalog.v1.json; operators override at .ao/cost/catalog.v1.json in their workspace. See docs/COST-MODEL.md §2 for object shape + field semantics. Runtime (checksum verification + stale-freshness gate + cost-aware routing) lands in FAZ-B PR-B2/B3.

catalog_version.description: Schema-pinned version literal. Full snapshot replacement; no append-only growth. Breaking changes ship as price-catalog.schema.v2.json.

generated_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp the catalog was produced (scraping time for source=vendor_api, authoring time for manual/bundled).

source.description: Catalog origin. Controls vendor_model_id conditional requirement (W8v4 absorb — see allOf below).

stale_after.description: ISO-8601 timestamp after which the catalog is considered stale. Default rule if operators omit: generated_at + 90 days. Stale handling: default warn (policy_cost_tracking.strict_freshness=false); opt-in fail-closed (strict_freshness=true).

checksum.description: SHA-256 over entries[] array serialised as canonical JSON (sort_keys=True, ensure_ascii=False, separators=(",",":")), prefixed 'sha256:'. Loader recomputes and compares; mismatch raises PriceCatalogChecksumError.

entries.description: List of (provider_id, model) unit price records. At least one entry required — empty catalogs are rejected (a catalog with no entries is indistinguishable from catalog-missing at the B2 routing layer).

allOf.description: W8v4 + W2''v5 conditional: when the catalog's top-level source is vendor_api, every entry MUST carry a vendor_model_id (audit requirement). For bundled/manual sources, vendor_model_id stays optional — hand-curated catalogs should not be gated on knowing vendor-specific identifiers.

vendor_model_id.description: Vendor canonical identifier used for billing + audit (e.g. 'claude-3-5-sonnet-20241022'). Required when catalog-level source=vendor_api; optional otherwise.

model.description: Short routing key that ao_kernel.llm.resolve_route() matches against (e.g. 'claude-3-5-sonnet'). Decoupled from vendor_model_id so routing + billing can evolve independently.

cached_input_cost_per_1k.description: USD per 1000 cached prompt tokens. Absent means 'no caching discount' rather than 'same as input'.

currency.description: v1: USD only. Non-USD currencies deferred to FAZ-E enterprise scope (residency + multi-currency).

billing_unit.description: v1: per_1k_tokens only. Per-request + per-image billing deferred to FAZ-D+.

effective_date.description: ISO-8601 date the prices in this entry took effect at the vendor.
